use_cases: Adding ethereal shadow effects to product images in e-commerce listings
Creating animated atmospheric overlays for hero sections and media displays
Enhancing visual depth with configurable noise and displacement map effects
Applying continuous hue rotation animations for dreamy visual atmospheres
Integrating customizable SVG-based shadow filters into any React application
ai_summary: An SVG-based shadow overlay component that applies color matrices, displacement maps, and noise for ethereal visual effects. Features configurable animation with hue rotation, adjustable scale and speed, and optional noise overlays. Designed for enhancing media displays and creating atmospheric visual depth on images.
